intro_cards.title: Subject Marker: が
intro_cards.body:
が marks the grammatical subject — the thing performing the action or having the state.

• これがいいです。(This one is good.)
• 私が学生です。(It is I who am the student.)

は vs が:
• は (topic) sets what the sentence is 'about' — often known info
• が (subject) highlights who/what — often new info

• 田中さんは先生です。(Tanaka is a teacher. — topic: Tanaka)
• 田中さんが先生です。(It's Tanaka who is the teacher. — identifying)
